The 1:1 sparse/non-plural-dominant filtered cell contrasts with the animate profile, which literally satisfies the stated pass condition even though it is not a stable profile estimate.
The majority cells provide 105 filtered target plural rows and 0 target singular rows, so the surface singular-head baseline does not predict the filtered direction.

Both registered minority strings returned zero raw rows, which the stated fail condition defines as failure of the query cell as a useful projection test, not failure of the graph.

card_result_verdicts.reason: The required nodes and edges are present, the forbidden retrieval-to-licensing edge is absent, and the data-bearing majority and bunch tests support the scoped agreement module without licensing score movement.

strongest_instability: The clearest variance is that minority-coca-uninformative meets its own query-cell fail condition but is labeled inconclusive in the target evaluation.
minimal_change: Recode the minority query cell as failed and the inanimate contrast as literal pass/sparse while leaving module survival and numeric score unchanged.
